posts.text: Before Brexit, England mostly paid farmers to farm, handing out subsidies per hectare. The government has remorselessly slashed such payments. It could be even bolder https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/03/26/england-has-shown-the-world-how-to-replace-farm-subsidies?taid=69c8dc0bf7ed800001b23c8a&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: Yemen's Houthi Group, an Iranian ally, has threatened to close the Bab al-Mandab Strait, which currently handles 12% of global trade.
